title: Department Manager Vacancy at KFC India Global Group - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at KFC India Global Group - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Department Manager with drive and ambition, KFC India Global Group in Kolkata is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About KFC India Global Group:
KFC India Global Group is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Learning & development budget
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Kolkata, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with KFC India Global Group!
